name: Granim.js — Animated Gradient Background
description: Canvas-based fluid animated gradient background with multi-state colour transitions. Uses the site's primary colour automatically.
head:
<style>
  [data-granim] { position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
  [data-granim] > canvas { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 0; opacity: 0.55; }
  [data-granim] > *:not(canvas) { position: relative; z-index: 1; }
</style>
body:
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/granim@2.0.0/dist/granim.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-granim]').forEach(function (el) {
      var c1 = el.getAttribute('data-granim-c1') || '#5b4dff';
      var c2 = el.getAttribute('data-granim-c2') || '#2dd4bf';
      var c3 = el.getAttribute('data-granim-c3') || c1;
      var canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
      el.insertBefore(canvas, el.firstChild);
      canvas.id = 'granim-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2);
      new Granim({ element: canvas, direction: 'diagonal', isPausedWhenNotInView: true,
        states: { 'default-state': { gradients: [[c1, c2], [c2, c3], [c3, c1]], transitionSpeed: 3000 } } });
    });
  });
</script>
